The '''aquatic gundark''' was an aquatic preator that lived on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. It had multiple [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], making it capable of seeing below and above [[Water/Legends|water]] simultaneously. They were medium-sized creatures that stalked the shallows of streams and lakes for prey, such as [[Runyip/Legends|runyips]] and [[Whisper bird/Legends|whisper birds]]. It is important to note that this and several other animals throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the Galaxy]] were called "gundarks," often to be synonymous with "surly". Most were not related.<ref name="Wildlife" />
